levelList.name: Destroy the Sound, Crush Flat the Thought
levelList.desc: Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed Если у этого юнита есть [BlackNightmare]: - Convert all Coins to [SuperCoin:*Вечные монеты*] - When clashing against a non-Blunt Skill, Сила монет +2 и deal +50% урона - On Clashтеряет against a Blunt Skill: - Coin Power -2 и deal -50% урона - Damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target; On Hit, does not activate [Sinking:*Депрессии*] на цели Blunt weapons appear more frequently - At 75+ [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase], Blunt weapons appear less frequently - At 150+ [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase], Blunt weapons appear even less frequently The following effects activate depending on the weapon's Attack Type - Blunt weapons deal +60% урона - Non-Blunt weapons deal -30% урона [WhenUse] Получает 3 [Breath:*Кумара*] и +2 счётчика [Breath:*Кумара*] [WinDuel] Raise target's Stagger Threshold by 25 - At 150+ [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase], this effect does not activate

levelList.name: Stab the Heart of Silence, Penetrate the Memory

levelList.name: With Tempered Secret, Sever the Form

Финальная сила +1 и deal +10% урона за каждые ally defeated in this Encounter
[DefeatDuel] Базовая сила -8
[DefeatDuel] Damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target

levelList.name: Do You Like Dolls?
levelList.desc:
Финальная сила +1 и deal +5% урона за каждые ally defeated in this Encounter
[DefeatDuel] Базовая сила -10
[DefeatDuel] Damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target

levelList.name: I'll Go fer Scissors. How 'Bout You?
levelList.desc: If this Skill is an Unopposed Attack, или if this Skill loses a Clash, deal +300% урона [StartDuel] If target has [ResultReduction], Сила клеша +20 [WinDuel] This Skill does not trigger the target's Defense Skill [WinDuel] End this Skill и use "You Win..." on the target

levelList.name: You Win...
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
This Skill has the following properties:
- Does not trigger Defense Skills
- Its attack does not hit
[WhenUse] Apply 2 [AttackUp] на цели на следующий ход
[EndSkill] Хилит (this Coin's Финальная сила x 5) ХП for 2 Sinners that have the lowest current ХП

levelList.name: Let's Play Together Forever~!
levelList.desc: This Skill does not trigger Defense Skills, и can be Clashed with regardless of Speed [WhenUse] Deal -90% урона against targets that have equipped Defense Skills [StartDuel] Финальная сила +20 [WinDuel] Deal +100% урона [DefeatDuel] Deal -90% урона и урона dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target [DefeatDuel] All Parts become Staggered на следующий ход [EndSkill] End this turn

levelList.name: Installation Art no. 3: Improvised Ribcage
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
Prioritizes enemy with the highest level
This Skill does not trigger Defense Skills
[WhenUse] Сила монет +1 за каждые 8 [Laceration:*Кетчупа*] на цели (макс. 2)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] Deal IQ урона instead of ХП урона
[OnSucceedAttack] Stagger target и turn target в [LivingSpecimenTheRings] на следующий ход

levelList.name: Tibia's Melody - Anatomization of the Unanatomized by the Anatomized
levelList.desc: During the turn this unit has this Skill equipped, получает 1 [PlusCoinValueDown] и 1 [ResultReduction] when hit by Attack Skills (once per Skill; макс. 3 times per turn) Cannot be Staggered before using this Skill On Kill with this Skill: Хилит 15 IQ за каждые target killed [StartBattle] Получает 4 [Protection] [WhenUse] Deal +3% урона за каждые 6 ([Laceration:*Кетчупа*] on main target + [Laceration:*Кетчупа*] on sub-target) (макс. 30%) [DefeatDuel] Deal -90% урона и урона dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target [EndSkill] [MineTheRings] expires

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] Получает 1 [Protection] на следующий ход (once per Skill)
